name: Chrieser
bio: Titled King Chrieser, Soul Dust, he is an ancient, undead monarch wrapped in linen bandages and clad in rusted, tattered armor. Chrieser wields an old-world axe imbued with dark magic, and his very presence brings a dry, deathly wind. Arising not for loyalty to any ruler but out of pure hunger for conquest, Chrieser fights without mercy. His magic manifests as storms of sand and decay, a reflection of the ruin he embodies. Once a king, now only a spectral shadow seeking domination.
A mummified king summoned as a trial opponent; destroyed by Vis's serpent, Venin.
